text_jp:
…消滅した…！
博士…田所博士は？！{END}
text_en: …He vanished…! Doctor… What about Dr Tadokoro!?{END}

text_jp:
Ｖ３、博士は…
闇に心をとらわれた人間は悪なのか？{END}
text_en: V3, the doctor… If darkness captures a person's heart, does that make him evil?{END}

text_jp:
人の心には光と闇、どちらもある…
しかしそれが人間だ…{END}
text_en: The human heart holds both light and darkness… But that is what makes us human…{END}

text_jp:
そして悪は、その心に付け込み利用する
私はそいつらと戦う！{END}
text_en: And evil preys on that heart and uses it. That is what I fight!{END}

text_jp:
悪と戦うのに必要なのは力じゃない
悪に負けない心の強さだ！{END}
text_en: What you need to fight evil is not power, but a heart strong enough not to lose to evil!{END}
